summary: Completed comprehensive frontend UI/UX testing for AI Travel Planner. All requested features successfully implemented including hero section with CTA overlay, sticky navbar with glassmorphism, travel-themed fonts, See More buttons, card animations, professional styling, and SEO optimization.

flaky_endpoints.impact: Authentication not working, but doesn't affect UI testing

design_issues.impact: Minor - doesn't break functionality, just missing some images

passed_tests: Homepage loads with full viewport hero section
Navbar sticky behavior with glassmorphism effects
Travel-themed fonts (Playfair Display + Montserrat) properly applied
CTA button 'Start with AI Chat' prominently visible on hero
See More buttons: 'See All Destinations' and 'Explore More Gems'
Destination and hidden gem card hover effects with line animations
Footer with Quick Links, Legal sections, and social media hover effects
SEO meta tags and Schema.org structured data present
All interactive elements clickable and working
